compiled_state.title: RED: Create test-review-stats.sh for bash wrapper
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create tests/scripts/test-review-stats.sh with tests for the bash wrapper script. Tests call review-stats.sh which does not exist yet — all should FAIL (RED).

Test functions (4):
- test_review_stats_default_30_day_window: Call review-stats.sh with fixture events, verify output contains metrics table
- test_review_stats_since_flag: Call with --since=YYYY-MM-DD, verify filtered output
- test_review_stats_all_flag: Call with --all, verify all events included
- test_review_stats_empty_events_dir: Call with empty .review-events/, verify graceful output (no crash, "No events found" message)

## TDD Requirement
RED — review-stats.sh wrapper does not exist.

## Test Approach
Create temp .tickets-tracker/ worktree with .review-events/ containing fixture JSONL files. Call review-stats.sh and assert output format.

## Files to Modify
- tests/scripts/test-review-stats.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file syntactically valid. Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-review-stats.sh
- [ ] 4+ test functions. Verify: grep -c "^test_review_stats" tests/scripts/test-review-stats.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
